asr_config.notes: Offline transcript-file ASR is used for deterministic assessment runs. Production should use multilingual ASR with English and Filipino/Tagalog code-switching enabled.

tts_config.preferred_voice: Filipino or Philippine English voice if installed
tts_config.compromise: Windows SAPI may fall back to the default installed voice; response text and WAV are still generated for demo evidence.

renewal_reminder.taglish: Opo, noted po. Para active pa rin ang policy, kailangan mabayaran ang premium bago ang due date. Para hindi ma-lapse ang coverage, tutulungan ko po kayong i-check ang amount at payment option.
renewal_reminder.filipino: Opo. Para manatiling active ang policy, kailangan mabayaran ang premium bago ang due date. Matutulungan ko po kayong i-check ang amount at payment option.
renewal_reminder.english: Yes. To keep the policy active, the premium should be paid before the due date. I can help confirm the amount and payment option.

lead_qualification.taglish: Sige po. Para ma-check ang tamang coverage, ito po ba ay for yourself, family protection, o pagdagdag ng beneficiary or rider?
lead_qualification.filipino: Sige po. Para malaman ang tamang coverage, ito po ba ay para sa sarili, family protection, o pagdagdag ng benepisyaryo o rider?
lead_qualification.english: Sure. To check the right coverage, is this for yourself, family protection, or adding a beneficiary or rider?

price_objection.taglish: Gets ko po na importante ang budget. Pwede nating tingnan ang lower premium option o i-adjust ang riders para sakto pa rin ang coverage.
price_objection.filipino: Naiintindihan ko po na importante ang budget. Pwede nating tingnan ang mas mababang premium o bawasan ang riders habang may coverage pa rin.
price_objection.english: I understand budget matters. We can review a lower premium option or adjust riders while keeping useful coverage.

busy_later.taglish: No problem po. I can schedule a callback. Anong oras po mas convenient?
busy_later.filipino: Walang problema po. Pwede tayong mag-schedule ng callback. Anong oras po kayo available?
busy_later.english: No problem. I can schedule a callback. What time is convenient?

human_escalation.taglish: Opo, i-connect ko po kayo sa licensed advisor para maayos na masagot ang policy at coverage questions ninyo.
human_escalation.filipino: Opo, ikokonekta ko kayo sa licensed advisor para maayos na masagot ang policy at coverage questions ninyo.
human_escalation.english: Yes, I can connect you with a licensed advisor for policy and coverage questions.

fallback.taglish: Pasensya na po, ayokong manghula. Pwede ko kayong i-connect sa advisor, o magtanong po kayo tungkol sa premium, policy, beneficiary, rider, lapse, o coverage.
fallback.filipino: Pasensya na po, ayokong manghula. Pwede ko kayong i-connect sa advisor, o magtanong po kayo tungkol sa premium, policy, benepisyaryo, rider, lapse, o coverage.
fallback.english: Sorry, I do not want to guess. I can connect you to an advisor, or you can ask about premium, policy, beneficiary, rider, lapse, or coverage.

localization_examples.literal_translation: Your policy will lapse if you do not pay.
localization_examples.localized: Para hindi ma-lapse ang coverage, kailangan po mabayaran ang premium before the due date.
localization_examples.why: Uses common Taglish insurance phrasing and softens the warning with polite 'po'.

localization_examples.literal_translation: Do you want to add a rider?
localization_examples.localized: Gusto niyo po bang magdagdag ng rider, like extra coverage for accident or critical illness?
localization_examples.why: Keeps 'rider' in English and explains it naturally.

localization_examples.literal_translation: You were referred by the bank.
localization_examples.localized: Nakita ko po na galing ito sa bank referral, so I can explain the coverage options connected to that offer.
localization_examples.why: Uses bank referral as a familiar bancassurance phrase.
